response.justification: While Bogdan is an exceptionally experienced engineer with strong software fundamentals, there is a substantial mismatch with this role's specialized requirements. The position demands expertise in embedded networking security, Linux kernel development, security protocols (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, encryption), and network technologies—none of which appear in his background. Most critically, native-level Japanese proficiency is a required qualification and is completely absent. His recent experience (5+ years) focuses on full-stack web development and DevOps infrastructure, while his last embedded systems work ended circa 2018. His C programming skills (last used in 2015) are significantly outdated for a role requiring strong current proficiency.
strengths: 16+ years of proven software engineering with strong fundamentals in TDD, clean code practices, and software craftsmanship
Solid experience with Linux systems, DevOps infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and low-level system administration
Demonstrated ability to rapidly acquire diverse technologies and lead complex projects across multiple technical domains
concerns: Native-level Japanese language proficiency is explicitly required but not mentioned anywhere on the resume
Recent career trajectory (past 5+ years) is entirely full-stack web and application development; embedded systems work ended ~2018 with no recent firmware or kernel experience
Completely absent domain expertise in security technologies, protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal), encryption, or network security—the core of the role

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking security domain expertise or experience with required protocols
Outdated C programming experience and no recent embedded systems work
